title: GeoLeaf Data Mapping
description: mapping.json — POI data normalization mapping for a GeoLeaf profile. Maps raw external data fields to GeoLeaf's normalized POI format.

source.description: Identifier or description of the data source.

mapping.description: Field mapping object. Keys are normalized GeoLeaf field names (e.g. "id", "title", "location.lat"), values are dot-notation paths in the raw data source.
